invention.inventor: Michael Faraday, Ottó Bláthy, Miksa Déri, Károly Zipernowsky
invention.discovery: Faraday's induction experiments led to the first practical transformers in the 1880s for AC power systems.

evolution.event: Zipernowsky, Déri, Bláthy build first efficient transformers
Ferrite and toroidal designs mature for electronics
